Name: SkeletonParam
Description: Determines the parameters for character skeleton and foot inverse kinematics .

Fields.Name: Neck Turn Gain
Fields.Description: The amount of gain for neck turning. The higher the value, the faster it turns.

Fields.Name: Height from Origin to Ground
Fields.Description: In metres.

Fields.Name: Minimum Ankle Height
Fields.Description: The minimum height at which the ankle can be raised. In metres.

Fields.Name: Maximum Ankle Height
Fields.Description: The maximum height at which the ankle can be raised. In metres.

Fields.Name: Maximum Bend Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum angle at which the knee can be bent (cosine value). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Minimum Bend Angle
Fields.Description: Minimum angle at which the knee can be bent (cosine value). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Lowest Ankle Height
Fields.Description: If the ankle is lower than this height, assume they are together. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Highest Ankle Height
Fields.Description: If the ankle is higher than this height, assume they are apart. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Ankle Raycast: Upward Distance
Fields.Description: The distance above the ankle at which the raycast occurs. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Ankle Raycast: Downward Distance
Fields.Description: The distance below the ankle at which the raycast occurs. In centimetres.

Fields.Name: Toe Position: X
Fields.Description: The x-coordinate of the toe.

Fields.Name: Toe Position: Y
Fields.Description: The y-coordinate of the toe.

Fields.Name: Toe Position: Z
Fields.Description: The z-coordinate of the toe.

Fields.Name: Gain on IK Toggle
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of gain applied when IK is toggled on and off.

Fields.Name: Gain on Ground Height Increase
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of gain applied when the ground height increases.

Fields.Name: Gain on Ground Height Decrease
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of gain applied when the ground height decreases.

Fields.Name: Gain on Foot Raise
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of gain applied when a foot is raised.

Fields.Name: Gain on Foot Plant
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of gain applied when a foot is planted to the ground.

Fields.Name: Gain on Foot Lock Toggle
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of gain applied when a foot is locked or unlocked.

Fields.Name: Knee Axis Type
Fields.Description: The axial direction of the knee to use.

Fields.Name: Use Foot Locking
Fields.Description: If ON, feet and ankles will be locked.

Fields.Name: Use Foot Placement
Fields.Description: If ON, foot placement is active.

Fields.Name: Twist Knee Axis Type
Fields.Description: Axial direction that ignores rotation of the knee joint for twisting.

Fields.Name: Neck Turn Priority
Fields.Description: The lower it is, the faster it will turn. -1 does not turn the head.

Fields.Name: Neck Turn Maximum Rotation
Fields.Description: The maximum rotation angle for this joint. Can't bend beyond this angle.
